_note: D.1 producer-side cascade fixture for the small-power C.4 example (uk-sauna-with-heater-exemption). UK 2400×2000 mm domestic sauna cabin with single hard-wired BS EN 60335-2-53 sauna heater (6 kW). Functionally identical to the existing electrical/special-locations/examples/uk-sauna-with-3-zone-derivation/ fixture but EXPLICITLY tagged as a small-power-consumer cascade source via _special_locations_cascade_source. The file-tree naming makes the producer-side intent of 'this is the small-power-consumer source' auditable. The intent-out.json's special_locations_zoning block is byte-identical to the payload inlined at C.4-ship in electrical/small-power/examples/uk-sauna-with-heater-exemption/output.json consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning.payload — verified by Python dict equality at D.1 ship.

_special_locations_cascade_source.standalone_example_dir: electrical/special-locations/examples/uk-sauna-with-3-zone-derivation (functionally identical; this fixture is the small-power-consumer-tagged twin)
_special_locations_cascade_source.consumer_invariant_signalled: INV-12 (4 sub-check sequence) on rooms[].room_type='sauna' Part-7 enum trigger; §703 3-zone split + rcd_blanket_by_room with sauna_heater_excluded=true cascaded to small-power
_special_locations_cascade_source._note: No upstream consumer intent — special-locations is the PRODUCER; small-power is the CONSUMER. One-way emission. consumed_lighting_layout_intent in intent-out.json is null.

anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Sauna heater extracted from architect Rev-B prefabricated cabin plan dated 2026-06-02; 400×400 floor-standing electric heater rated 6 kW per BS EN 60335-2-53; sited at NW corner of sauna cabin per client schedule.

existing_fixtures._consumed_from: small-power intent (uk-sauna-with-heater-exemption) circuit C01 (sauna heater dedicated radial; rcd_posture=no_rcd_with_documented_§411_exception; hard-wired BS EN 60335-2-53 heater appliance; circuit excluded from the 30 mA RCD blanket per §703.411.3.3)

rcd_posture_inputs.rcd_exception_citation: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §703.411.3.3 (sauna heater circuit excluded from the 30 mA RCD blanket per the verified standards file — see shared/standards/electrical/BS7671/part7-special-locations.json §703 key requirement 'sauna circuits except the heater') + BS EN 60335-2-53 (sauna heating appliances — fault-current characteristics of low-resistance heater elements make 30 mA RCD discrimination impractical without nuisance trips)
